creator: townwear@gmail.com
text:
I confirmed it.
I approve it.
Thank you!

2011/1/2 TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@freebsd.org>

> Hi Takashi Kato-san,
>
> I have modified your patch as follows.
>
> - Use MASTER_SITES_ABBREVS in MASTER_SITES
> - Add LICENSE
> - Add OPTIONS
> - Drop MD5 checksum from distinfo
> - Make portlint happy
>
> Please confirm it.
>
> Thanks,
>
> --
> TAKATSU Tomonari
>
